overall.description: A first-person perspective from inside a luxury flying vehicle navigating through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night. The vehicle flies through neon-lit canyons between skyscrapers, under massive industrial structures, and over dense traffic, featuring prominent green and cyan neon lighting typical of Cyberpunk 2077.

tall modern glass building with illuminated windows
tall futuristic building with neon accents
palm trees visible at street level below

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from a luxury flying vehicle cruising through a neon-lit cyberpunk city. The vehicle passes a prominent 'NO FUTURE' sign while flying between modern glass skyscrapers. Palm trees are visible at street level, and the green-lit dashboard dominates the foreground.

events.description: enters dark narrow corridor between tall buildings, blue holographic fan appears on left

dark concrete industrial building with minimal lighting

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a narrow, dark corridor between industrial buildings, significantly reducing sky visibility. A distinctive blue holographic fan rotates on the left side. The lighting becomes darker and more enclosed as the vehicle progresses through the tight space.

illuminated pyramid structure with green laser beam comes into view ahead

large pyramid structure with cyan neon edges and bright illumination

segments.scene_description: The vehicle emerges from the dark corridor to pass under a massive greenhouse-like structure with a bright grid of lights. An illuminated pyramid with a prominent green laser beam becomes visible in the distance, serving as a landmark. The lighting shifts from dark to brightly lit as the vehicle passes under the grid.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial view of busy intersection with dense street traffic

events.description: emerges from under structure into open air above busy neon-lit street with heavy traffic
flying police vehicle with searchlights appears hovering overhead

segments.scene_description: The vehicle emerges into open air above a busy intersection filled with dense traffic. A large vertical billboard dominates the right side while a flying police vehicle with searchlights hovers overhead. The scene is brightly lit with neon advertisements and street lights.

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a dilapidated industrial district with destroyed buildings and debris scattered below. A flying vehicle with powerful spotlights scans the area ahead, creating dramatic lighting effects. The environment shifts from commercial downtown to industrial ruins with abandoned structures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit cyberpunk metropolis that transitions from a polished commercial center into a desolate industrial wasteland. It begins by cruising between glass skyscrapers and palm trees, passing a prominent NO FUTURE sign while a green-lit dashboard frames the view. As the vehicle dives into a narrow, dark corridor between industrial buildings, the open sky vanishes and is replaced by the glow of a rotating blue holographic fan. The scene then opens up as the vehicle passes under a bright grid of lights within a massive greenhouse structure, revealing a distant illuminated pyramid emitting a green laser beam. This brightness peaks as the camera emerges over a bustling intersection filled with dense traffic and vertical billboards, before finally gliding into a dilapidated district of destroyed buildings and debris scanned by the harsh spotlights of a hovering vehicle.
